message:
feat: Implement real traceback, tracemalloc, and mailbox functionality

traceback.zig - Real filename/function name extraction:
- printEntry() now extracts co_filename and co_name from CodeObject
- Walks frame -> interpreter frame -> code object chain
- Falls back to "<unknown>" if code object not available

tracemalloc.zig - Real snapshot comparison:
- compare_to() builds maps of allocations by filename:line
- Computes size_diff and count_diff between snapshots
- Handles new allocations (in self only) and removed allocations (in other only)
- Returns StatisticDiff list with all changes

mailbox.zig - Real file-backed mailbox operations:
- Added file handle, is_locked, modified tracking fields
- lock(): Uses std.fs.File.lock() for exclusive file locking
- unlock(): Releases file lock
- flush(): Writes all messages to file with headers and body
- close(): Flushes, unlocks, and closes file handle
- add()/remove(): Mark mailbox as modified
- keys(): Returns array of message indices
- getString(): Returns message body for given key
